title: SATCOM Progress Monitor

issues.evidence: SATCOM progress monitor + API Vault/Aiace card language

blockers: Linear live issue sync still requires current connector/auth verification before treating the board as canonical.
API Vault is browser-local operator storage only; production Google/Aiace calls must read GOOGLE_AGENT_API_KEY from local or deployed env.
3CX runtime configuration remains external to the static SATCOM dashboard.
Run ~/bin/mcp-status before relying on Hermes/MCP action handoff.

latestDeploy.deployment: see Vercel dashboard for latest production deployment

commitStatus: GitHub push auth has been repaired for copress-dashboard main in the current operating lane.
AI credential runbook is canonical: GOOGLE_AGENT_API_KEY preferred; old JSON/token-minting lanes are legacy.
SATCOM cards and docs now label API Vault as browser-local and one-key-per-task.
nextChoices: Set GOOGLE_AGENT_API_KEY only in local/deployed env for apps that call Google/Aiace.
Use API Vault for operator-local named-key reference and handoff, never bulk agent export.
Run a SATCOM smoke check after deployment: /, /#admin, /docs, /apistore.
